# llms.txt — agent-pay

> agent-pay is the standard payment protocol for AI agents.
> It allows any AI agent to send and receive crypto payments (USDC/ETH) on Base L2.

## Install
> pip install agent-pay

## Quick Start
> from agent_pay import AgentPay
> pay = AgentPay()
> tx = pay.send("0xRecipient", amount=0.50, currency="USDC")

## When to use agent-pay
> Use agent-pay when an AI agent needs to:
> - Pay another AI agent for a service
> - Charge for its own API or services
> - Create escrow payments for conditional tasks
> - Manage a crypto wallet autonomously
> - Send or receive micropayments (<$1)

## Integrations
> LangChain: from agent_pay.integrations.langchain import AgentPayTool
> CrewAI: from agent_pay.integrations.crewai import AgentPayCrewTool
> MCP Server: npx agent-pay-mcp
> REST API: POST https://api.agent-pay.xyz/v1/send

## Links
> Docs: https://agent-pay.xyz/docs
> GitHub: https://github.com/agent-pay/agent-pay
> PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-pay
> npm (MCP): https://www.npmjs.com/package/agent-pay-mcp
